subject: [TEST] Basic CNF macro
commit_message:
[TEST] Basic CNF macro

Basic CNF macro added with refactoring that enables debugging under IDE
Also SDK upgraded to 9.2 what required adaptation in existing tests

Issue-ID: TEST-376
Signed-off-by: Lukasz Rajewski <lukasz.rajewski@orange.com>
Change-Id: I697857bc0c13e86b88b71c3b46e0c4b59751939c
Signed-off-by: mrichomme <morgan.richomme@orange.com>

Patch Set 10:

note that the patch will not allow to check basic_cnf_macro (not declared in the CI)
but it will check that there is no regression on the existing use case (important after such refactoring)
once merged, the use case will be ready for test

for basic_cnf_macro, the way to test will be
- include basic_cnf_macro in the xtesting docker
- declare the use case in the DB
- test the use case "manually" on a daily master 
- when OK, update xtesting-onap to include the use case in CI
